pipeline_failure: 1. Check Airflow task logs for the failed task
3. Re-run the specific failed task from Airflow UI
4. If DQ failure — check dq_scorecard.json for details
5. Escalate to on-call owner if issue persists > 1 hour
dq_failure: 3. Trace back to source for upstream data quality issues
4. Update DQ thresholds if source data expectations changed
source_unavailable: 4. Trigger manual backfill from Airflow UI
